lines.speaker: Keith
lines.text: Hello there. The name's Keith. I'm the farmer here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're pretty far out of the way here. How come?

lines.speaker: Keith
lines.text: It's a peaceful life. Out here I can avoid the drama and politics of the big settlements.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aren't you worried about how close the lizardmen are though?

lines.speaker: Keith
lines.text: The Shayzien troops keep them busy. They've not tried coming up this way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. I'll leave you to it.
